title: Evaluation of Subsurface Moisture Dynamics and Leakage Pathways Through Geoelectrical Mapping: Insights from Nagi Lake, South Sikkim
description: SpeakForWater Episode 1: Evaluation of Subsurface Moisture Dynamics and Leakage Pathways Through Geoelectrical Mapping: Insights from Nagi Lake, South Sikkim. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
